creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
ia64 and pc98 have been disabled (but *not* deleted) from the Hardware field.

sparc64 has been left there as its still supported in stable/11 and the definition of 'support' is unclear regarding 'taking bug reports' for archs/versions that noone is likely to work on.

We still need a plan for what we do with the existing/open bugs for architectures that are no longer supported.
